g.text: how does run_context_agent retrieve related files?
gathers review context by fanning out over every changed file and
merging two retrieval strategies, then applying a budget.
For each file it runs the import-graph lookup and semantic search concurrently
The per-file chunks and related-file chunks are then deduplicated by path (highest
